title: Labor-Market Research, Role Families, and Data Limits · Evidence Recall
summary: A delayed hiring review reconstructs labor-market research, role families, and data limits from target, claim, evidence, audience, action, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, consent, owner, and next-decision evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for dated labor-market evidence brief after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish occupations, job titles, functions, industries, products, seniority, and employment arrangements when mapping possible work.
Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Occupation Vs Title
steps.instruction:
Order the Occupation Vs Title evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Occupation Vs Title.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Occupation Vs Title assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Occupation Vs Title, keep Occupation Vs Title connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The review variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Distinguish occupations, job titles, functions, industries, products, seniority, and employment arrangements when mapping possible work.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Occupation Vs Title has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Occupation Vs Title, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Occupation Vs Title precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Occupation Vs Title, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The review variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Distinguish occupations, job titles, functions, industries, products, seniority, and employment arrangements when mapping possible work.

For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Occupation Vs Title, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: The same title names the same work at every organization.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints for the review Occupation Vs Title case
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure for the review Occupation Vs Title case
